# Clawnitor

> Agent monitoring, smart rules, kill switch, and auto-kill for OpenClaw. One plugin, total control.

Clawnitor is a monitoring and intervention SaaS for AI agents running on the OpenClaw platform. It hooks into before_tool_call and enforces safety rules at the execution layer. When an agent breaks your rules, Clawnitor stops it.

## Core Features

- **Event Capture**: Every tool call, LLM request, message, and lifecycle event captured with zero config
- **Smart Rules**: Threshold, rate, keyword, and natural language rules. Pattern rules block actions before they execute.
- **Kill Switch**: 3-layer pre-action defense — server kill state (WebSocket), local failsafe (spend/rate/blocklist), cached rule evaluation
- **Auto-Kill**: Agents that trigger repeated rule violations (default: 3 in 10 minutes) are automatically shut down. Configurable per agent.
- **AI Anomaly Detection**: 72-hour behavioral baselines. Flags deviations from learned normal behavior.
- **Multi-Channel Alerts**: Email, Telegram, Discord, SMS
- **Works Offline**: Local failsafe and cached rules stay active even without internet

## Pricing

- **Free**: 1 agent, 3 pattern rules, email alerts, 7-day history, 1 manual kill/month
- **Pro ($5/mo)**: 1 agent (+$3/ea), unlimited pattern rules, 5 NL rules, unlimited kills + auto-kill, AI anomaly detection, all alert channels, 90-day history
- **Team ($19/mo)**: 5 agents (+$2/ea), 20 NL rules, 5-min AI eval, unlimited shared rules, 10 members, 1-year history
- **Enterprise (Custom)**: Unlimited everything, SSO/SAML, audit logs, custom webhooks, custom roles

## Installation

```
openclaw plugins install @clawnitor/plugin
npx clawnitor init
```

Or manually: sign up at clawnitor.io, copy your API key, add to openclaw.json:
```json
{
  "plugins": {
    "@clawnitor/plugin": {
      "apiKey": "clw_live_..."
    }
  }
}
```

## Links

- [Landing Page](https://clawnitor.io)

## API

Base URL: `https://api.clawnitor.io`

Authentication: Bearer token (API key) for plugin-to-API. Internal secret + X-User-Email header for dashboard-to-API.

Key endpoints:
- `POST /api/events` — Ingest agent events
- `GET /api/agents` — List registered agents
- `GET /api/rules` — Get cached rules (plugin polls every 60s)
- `POST /api/kill` — Trigger manual kill switch
- `PUT /api/agents/:id/auto-kill` — Configure auto-kill settings per agent
- `GET /api/status` — Health check and AI provider status
